note: TX detail polish on top of v174 (which kept the wallet.sostcore.com hotfix activation + Document Reference label runtime patch). The capsule body in the TX detail panel now reads as the headline content of the transaction, not a footnote. Label changed from 'text' to 'capsule text'. Font size 11px → 14px. Border + text are tinted in the capsule type's own colour (green for Open Note, cyan for Structured Data, magenta for Certification, yellow for Document Reference) — same palette the capsule type row above already uses. Left border bar at 3px so the message reads at a glance. Same change applies to mempool detail. NO consensus, NO RPC, NO transaction format. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
